flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science fell 44% between 2005 and 2008 (9 → 5).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science rose 33% between 2013 and 2016 ($4.5k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 10-year median earnings
flags.summary: 10-year median earnings at Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science fell 20% between 2011 and 2014 ($166.2k → $132.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).
